content.question: Will a formal government proposal to reform 6/8-year ginmázium admissions be tabled before the 2026 legislative term ends, and if so, will it be framed as system abolition or as targeted admissions-procedure revision?
content.reduction_path: Systematic tracking of ministerial statements, draft legislation in parliamentary committees, and government coalition documents over the remainder of 2026; interviews with government and coalition spokesperson on the content and timeline of any intended reform.
